reviews.comment:
Tiene todos los servicios . Pero es muy cara la comida

(Translated by Google)
It has all the amenities. But the food is very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRejktTEdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar de paso, con bar, agua caliente y baños. Dormis junto a la estación de servicios.

(Translated by Google)
A good stopover spot, with a bar, hot water, and restrooms. You can sleep next to the gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncWREWkNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen café. Buena atención de los mozos del bar

(Translated by Google)
Very good coffee. Excellent service from the bartenders.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOE5pQWNREAE

reviews.comment:
Es la Estación de Servicio más importante de Ojo de Agua y alrededores.  Cuenta con servicio de comidas rápidas en el resto. Baños. Duchas. Venta de artesanías etc

(Translated by Google)
This is the largest service station in Ojo de Agua and the surrounding area. Fast food service is available at the restrooms, showers, and crafts for sale.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcmRmQWhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre está bien provista, se puede comer por kilo aunque recomiendo los sandwiches de pan francés, jamón y queso con manteca. No es barato

(Translated by Google)
It's always well-stocked; you can eat by the kilo, although I recommend the French bread sandwiches with ham and cheese and butter. It's not cheap.

reviews.comment:
Es carísimo,los baños siempre con falta de higiene. Hay poca organiacion en el comedor y mala voluntad para atender.

(Translated by Google)
It's extremely expensive, the bathrooms are always unhygienic, the dining room is poorly organized, and there's a lack of willingness to serve.
